title: elymus trichospicula
intro: Elymus trichospicula is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting immune function. Elymus trichospicula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
